description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the npetrovsky/docker-android-sdk-ndk Docker image, sets the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive, and runs chmod +x ./gradlew in a before_script for all jobs. Define a single stage named build and add a build job that executes ./gradlew assembleDebug. Configure the build job to upload the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact after the script finishes.
